title: Santa Red Christmas Crackers – Festive Holiday Party Crackers Set for Christmas Celebrations
features: CHRISTMAS CRACKERS are a delightful addition to your festive celebrations. Designed in a vibrant Santa Red, these novelty crackers enhance every occasion with cheer and excitement. Each set contains six beautifully crafted crackers that provide a sense of wonder and surprise, featuring charming Santa-themed designs that complement your holiday décor. Perfect for parties, family dinners, or seasonal gatherings, these crackers promise to create lasting memories and bring joy to guests of all ages. Make your Christmas truly special this year.

CELEBRATE the joy of the festive season by incorporating our Santa Red Christmas Crackers into your holiday traditions. Ideal for family meals and parties, these delightful crackers will surprise your guests with fun gifts and festive cheer, creating cherished memories that last a lifetime.
MEASUREMENT OF PRODUCT: H: 5 cm, L: 5.5 cm, W: 9 cm; 6 Christmas crackers in a pack.
